core_mechanism: perturbative projection of a disturbance onto the complete basis of squared (linearized) eigenfunctions of an integrable system's associated linear scattering operator, splitting the response into slow (adiabatic) evolution equations for a localized coherent structure's parameters plus a continuous-spectrum radiation component
brief_reason: The abstract builds the theory from the squared-eigenfunction completeness relation and adjoint structure of the Zakharov-Shabat scattering problem to project perturbations onto discrete and continuous spectral components, yielding leading-order evolution equations for the kink parameters and a radiative shelf.
